summary: Phase 4 comprehensive testing completed for ETI Educom website. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All new frontend pages and features verified working. Major features tested: Free Counselling landing page, Blogs with search/filters, FAQ with search/filters, Privacy Policy, Events with modal, updated Franchise form, Admin panel with 10 tabs including new Blogs, FAQs, SEO, Franchise Enquiries, and Counselling Leads tabs.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing DialogContent description (aria-describedby) - accessibility enhancement

passed_tests: Backend: Root endpoint (200 OK)
Backend: Health check endpoint (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/blogs (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/blogs - Create blog (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/blogs/:id (200 OK)
Backend: Blog validation (422 for invalid data)
Backend: GET /api/faqs (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/faqs - Create FAQ (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/faqs/:id (200 OK)
Backend: FAQ validation (422 for invalid data)
Backend: GET /api/seo (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/seo - Upsert SEO settings (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/seo/:page_slug (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/franchise-enquiry (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/franchise-enquiry (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/franchise-enquiry/:id (200 OK)
Backend: Franchise enquiry validation (422 for invalid data)
Backend: POST /api/counselling-leads (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/counselling-leads (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/counselling-leads/:id (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/events (200 OK)
Frontend: Homepage loads with logo only (no ETI EDUCOM text)
Frontend: Free Counselling button in header links correctly
Frontend: Free Counselling landing page renders (no header/footer)
Frontend: Free Counselling form submission to /api/counselling-leads works
Frontend: Blogs page at /blogs with search and category filters
Frontend: Blog detail page at /blogs/:slug shows full content
Frontend: FAQ page at /faq with search and category filters
Frontend: Privacy Policy page at /privacy-policy displays legal content
Frontend: Events page shows event cards that open modal on click
Frontend: Event modal displays full details (date, time, location, description)
Frontend: Franchise page has comprehensive enquiry form (all fields)
Frontend: Admin page has all 10 tabs (Events, Reviews, Programs, Blogs, FAQs, Jobs, SEO, Enquiries, Franchise, Leads)
Frontend: Admin Add Blog button and modal work
Frontend: Admin Add FAQ button present
Frontend: Admin Add/Update SEO button present
Frontend: Emergent badge NOT visible on pages
Frontend: Resources dropdown includes Events, Blogs, FAQ links
Frontend: Footer includes Privacy Policy link
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - proper use of Pydantic models, async/await patterns, data-testid attributes
Sample/fallback data pattern is good UX - Blogs and FAQs display sample data when database is empty
Free Counselling page properly implemented as standalone landing page without header/footer
All new API endpoints properly implement CRUD operations with validation
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test counselling lead during form submission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested. All new APIs (blogs, faqs, seo, franchise-enquiry, counselling-leads) working with CRUD operations. New pages (Free Counselling, Blogs, Blog Detail, FAQ, Privacy Policy) all rendering correctly. Admin panel extended with 5 new tabs. Emergent badge successfully removed. Sample data is shown when database collections are empty - working as designed.

new_pages: Free Counselling at /free-counselling - Lead capture landing page without header/footer
Blogs at /blogs - Blog listing with search and category filters
Blog Detail at /blogs/:slug - Single blog view with social share
FAQ at /faq - FAQ accordion with search and category filters
Privacy Policy at /privacy-policy - Legal content page
updated_pages: Franchise page - Comprehensive enquiry form with all required fields
Admin page - Extended with Blogs, FAQs, SEO, Franchise Enquiries, Counselling Leads tabs
header_footer_changes: Header: Logo only (ETI EDUCOM text removed), Free Counselling button added
Resources dropdown: Events, Blogs, FAQ links
